name: Dungeon Watchers
short_description: Survive and destroy monsters to your heart's content with the help of powerful and unique characters. Unlock new characters and discover the synergies with their abilities to unleash game-breaking builds and slay everything on your path.
detailed_description:
Massive dungeons around the land are infested with monsters due to evil summoners, but with the help of Dungeon Watchers, powerful individuals with power and skills, they can battle against this chaos. Gain coins rewards after cleaning a dungeon and unlock new characters, masteries and rings which will enhance your power to keep destroying everything on your screen.

Features

  • Short runs (under 20 minutes)

  • Not all characters are automatic, some require to aim or use active skills. The characters have unique gameplay styles (elemental magic witch, elf dropping bombs, cyclops using an army of robots and more...)

  • Enemies with different behaviors (slimes divide themself, ghosts don't move when you look at them, deadly worms going underground and more...)

  • Collect the crystals the monster drop to gain power and upgrade your magic and gain spells/skills.

  • Dozens of power ups to choose from to combine with the characters and break the game.

  • Upgrade your characters to unlock their full potential and conquer the toughest challenges.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese
